mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals monetary easing, reducing discount rates and boosting equity valuations, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns remain negative in 60%+ of periods when FEDFUNDS declines, or Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month decline in unemployment rate below 5% signals tightening labor markets, increasing corporate earnings momentum and driving S&P 500 positive returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are negative in 50%+ of instances when UNRATE < 5.0, or t-test p > 0.1 for return differences.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in residential construction (HOUST) and consumer spending (RSAFS) signals robust demand, creating positive momentum in S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction effect vanishes (p > 0.2 for joint coefficient) or 60d returns < 0 in 40%+ of co-expansion periods.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month rise in industrial production (INDPRO) above 113.9 suggests strengthening supply-side capacity, reducing inflationary pressures and supporting S&P 500 positive returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative in 50%+ of INDPRO > 113.9 periods or IC < 0.05 in rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month CPI inflation rate above 210.565 signals persistent price pressures, prompting central bank hawkishness and negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are positive in 60%+ of CPI > 210.565 periods or t-test p > 0.05 for return differences.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month surge in payroll employment (PAYEMS) above 138,495 signals strong labor market health, driving corporate profits and positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are negative in 50%+ of PAYEMS > 138495 periods or IC < 0.03 in rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly GDP contraction (GDPC1 < 11658.9) signals economic weakness, triggering risk-off sentiment and negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are positive in 50%+ of GDPC1 < 11658.9 periods or t-test p > 0.1 for return differences.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in industrial production (INDPRO) and housing starts (HOUST) signal supply-side deterioration, creating negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction effect disappears (p > 0.2 for joint coefficient) or 20d returns > 0 in 40%+ of co-contraction periods.
